name: Elise (Hot Spring)
description:
Youngest princess of Nohr. Sometimes slips out of the castle to enjoy herself at a famous hot spring. Appears in Fire Emblem Fates.

Elise is the second princess of Nohr. She loves hot springs so much that she’s been known to sneak out of the castle to take a dip!

Her outfit’s been specially designed for a perfect hot-spring outing—it’s all made from towel fabric, right down to the bows in her hair and on her waist!

And those rubber duckies may be extremely cute, but they’re not just for show—they’re actually weapons she keeps handy for just-in-case situations!

Elise says that she loved going to the hot spring with her sister Camilla and her friend Effie back in Nohr. I hope they get the chance to enjoy a trip together in Askr!

Full Art By: Mikuro (みく郎)
creator: Denki_The_Thunder_King27
